reviews.name: Susan Behrens
reviews.text: I had trouble with my right knee. It felt stiff, sore and achy. My brother supposed trying Bratton Therapy Centre. So I did and it was the best decision ever.They came up with a special exercise program, just for me which would strengthen knee. It worked and my knee feels so much better.The staff are kind and can’t do enough for you. I totally recommend them to anyone who has a physical problem.

reviews.name: Janet Imbraguglio
reviews.text: I am presently getting therapy for a rotator cuff surgery at Bratton physical therapy. It was highly recommended to me and I understand why. Having gone through Ochsner therapy for my previous shoulder, I can truly say there is no comparison. Bratton feels almost like family. I love the 15 minute heat treatment at the end of each visit.

reviews.name: Julissa Robinson
reviews.text: I came in here after knee surgery. This is the best physical therapy clinic in Slidell! I could barely walk with a walker at the beginning. I am walking unassisted and with a cane for longer distances within 3 weeks!

reviews.name: Lori Milford
reviews.text: Bratton Physical Therapy has helped me so much. I was in so much pain in my back and my hip that I could not function in my daily home and work life. Jena was able to pinpoint the root causes of my pain and develop a care plan to improve my condition. I cannot believe how much better I feel. After a few sessions, I am able to return to work and participate more fully in my social and daily life. I am certain I will continue to improve and look forward to being mostly pain-free. If you need help, don’t hesitate, go to Bratton Physical Therapy for a professional, life-changing experience.

reviews.name: H. "Chip" Brockhaus
reviews.text: Very knowledgeable owner and staff. Jena correctly determined the issue with my shoulder and prepared a treatment plan. Pain is now nearly 0 and my range of motion has improved significantly. Highly recommended.
